hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f && echo "$f" >> /tmp/orion-edited-files.txt; } 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "
import json, os, re, sys
TRACKED = '/tmp/orion-edited-files.txt'
APP_PATTERN = re.compile(r'/(frontend/src|backend/src)/')
if not os.path.exists(TRACKED):
    print(json.dumps({'continue': True})); sys.exit(0)
with open(TRACKED) as f:
    files = [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
os.unlink(TRACKED)
app_changed = any(APP_PATTERN.search(p) for p in files)
if app_changed:
    print(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': '[Preview Required] App code was edited but no dev server is running. Start dev servers and verify the change before finishing.'}))
else:
    print(json.dumps({'continue': True}))
"
